title: ortostachys recta
intro: Ortostachys recta, also known as the Straight Spike or Straight Stachys, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ortostachys recta include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Ortostachys recta can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it accessible for use in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
